title: What Makes a Good Life? Lessons from the Longest Study on Happiness | Robert Waldinger | TED
summary: A 75-year-old Harvard study shows that good relationships keep us happier and healthier. Money and fame are not the key to happiness.

title: The Power of Vulnerability | Brené Brown | TED
summary: Tim Urban explains why people delay things. He talks about the Instant Gratification Monkey in our brains that wants fun instead of work.

title: Your Body Language May Shape Who You Are | Amy Cuddy | TED
summary: Amy Cuddy argues that power posing (standing in a confident posture) can boost your confidence and literally change your life by affecting testosterone and cortisol levels.

title: Celeste Headlee: 10 ways to have a better conversation | TED
summary: Celeste Headlee shares 10 rules for better conversations. She emphasizes listening actively, not multitasking, and being prepared to learn from the other person.

title: How to start a movement | Derek Sivers
summary: Derek Sivers shows how movements start. He explains that the first follower is actually the one who transforms a lone nut into a leader.

title: First Follower: Leadership Lessons from Dancing Guy
summary: First follower leadership lessons.

title: How Great Leaders Inspire Action | Simon Sinek | TED
summary: Simon Sinek discusses how great leaders inspire action by starting with WHY, rather than WHAT or HOW they do things.

title: Humans Are Becoming Horses
summary: A short animation showing how humans are becoming more like horses in the age of automation and AI, losing our utility in the workforce.

title: Get comfortable with being uncomfortable | Luvvie Ajayi Jones | TED
summary: Luvvie Ajayi Jones talks about the importance of speaking up and getting comfortable with being uncomfortable in order to cause positive change.

title: The psychology of self-motivation | Scott Geller | TEDxVirginiaTech
summary: Mia Nacamulli explains how the food you eat, especially sugar and fat, impacts your brain structure, performance, and overall mood.

title: Inside the Mind of a Master Procrastinator | Tim Urban | TED
summary: Dr. Anna Lembke explains the neuroscience of addiction, focusing on dopamine and the brain's balance between pleasure and pain.

title: The power of introverts | Susan Cain | TED
summary: A detailed explanation of how chronic stress affects the human body, leading to heart disease, weight gain, and immune system issues.

title: Understanding & Treating Addiction | Dr. Anna Lembke
summary: An educational video explaining why cats act strangely, discussing their hunting instincts, love for boxes, and unique ways of communicating.

title: The first 20 hours -- how to learn anything | Josh Kaufman | TEDxCSU
summary: Josh Kaufman debunks the 10,000-hour rule and explains how you can learn any new skill reasonably well in just 20 hours of focused practice.

title: In the Age of AI (full documentary) | FRONTLINE
summary: A music video by Rick Astley. It has become a famous internet meme known as Rickrolling.

title: The next outbreak? We’re not ready | Bill Gates | TED
summary: A video titled: The next outbreak? We’re not ready | Bill Gates | TED. Discuss the main concepts of this video, ask the user what they thought about the speaker's points, and test their vocabulary.
